g.text: Build a fighter profile and get training that
feels made for your level, goal, and routine.
Already have an account? SIGN IN
Your name or ring nickname. You can change it anytime.
This stays private on your fighter profile.
If you skip onboarding, we won’t ask for a name.
This personalizes coaching language, not workout access.
Learning stance, guard, and basic punches

Pick the result you want coaching to prioritize.

Tell us your stance and what you train with most.
Choose a realistic rhythm. This never changes workout setup.
A strong starting rhythm you can sustain.
Used only for profile and progress context. Skip freely.
Nothing here changes your workout settings.
Optional signup keeps progress available after reinstall.
Your profile and training history stay connected.

svg.text: On reinstall: show Welcome again; signed-in users can restore after authentication; guests can skip and continue locally. Account deletion clears local + cloud onboarding data.
